config.exam_name: 45 Metric Views in Databricks Unity Catalog

question.line: What is the primary purpose of a Metric View in Databricks Unity Catalog?

options.A: To automatically ingest streaming data into Delta tables
options.B: To provide a centralized, reusable, governed semantic layer for business metrics and dimensions
options.C: To replace SQL Warehouses for analytics
options.D: To create Delta Live Tables pipelines automatically
options.E: To manage cluster configurations and autoscaling

question.line: Which two types of objects are defined within a Metric View?
How are Metric Views created in Databricks?
What is the primary benefit of defining business logic once in a Metric View?

options.A: It automatically creates dashboards for every user.
options.B: It ensures everyone uses the same KPI calculations and reduces duplicated SQL.
options.C: It eliminates the need for Unity Catalog.
options.D: It converts all data into Delta format.
options.E: It replaces SQL with Python for analytics.

question.line: How are reusable measures referenced when querying a Metric View?
Which SQL statement is not supported when querying a Metric View?

options.B: SELECT order_status_readable, measure(total_orders) GROUP BY order_status_readable
options.E: SELECT order_year, measure(total_orders) GROUP BY order_year

question.line: What advanced capability allows Metric Views to calculate values such as Current Year Orders and Previous Year Orders?
Why are joins included in Metric Views?

options.A: To replace SQL Warehouses with Delta Live Tables
options.C: To expose additional business dimensions, such as customer information, without requiring users to write joins themselves
options.D: To convert relational databases into Delta tables

question.line: What advantage do AI/BI Dashboards gain by using Metric Views?

options.A: Dashboard developers no longer need to define complex SQL calculations for every report because reusable business logic already exists.
options.B: Dashboards can only display KPI cards.
options.C: SQL Warehouses are no longer required.
options.D: All dashboards become Streaming Tables automatically.
options.E: Forecasting requires manual SQL coding for every visualization.

question.line: What permissions are typically granted to users with Consumer Access?

options.A: Full workspace development and cluster creation privileges
options.B: SQL development and notebook editing permissions
options.C: Dashboard and Genie access without development or cluster management privileges
options.E: Unity Catalog ownership of all Metric Views
